_comment: Curated enrichment keyed by normalized name (lowercase, trimmed, single-spaced). Only fields we're confident about. `aliases` merges alternate names (e.g. Robin's Meetup handle 'Rob Bob') into one person. GitHub handles from the big-graph melb-tech crawl are treated as verified.

overrides.name: Nick Meinhold
overrides.note: Co-runs Imagineering. Bridge to the big community graph.

overrides.name: Robin Langer
overrides.note: Co-runs Imagineering; maintains the sibling dashboard at raggedr.github.io/imagineering-dashboard. Bridge to the big community graph.

overrides.name: Chetan Ashtivkar
overrides.note: Android/Kotlin dev; 40 repos since 2015. Civic streak — built DogRescueMumbaiHelplines. First member captured.

overrides.name: Om Subrato Dey
overrides.note: AI Researcher @ VIT Chennai; Industry 4.0 NUS cohort winner. Second India node. (Empty dupe handle OMSUBRATODEY — XOSDX canonical.)

overrides.name: Abhishek Godhani
overrides.note: Luma MiniSprints guest (Mar 28, Going). GitHub exact-match.

Mutual GitHub follow with Anushka Jogalekar (each follows the other) - the pair arrived together. GH-orbit lead: follows geopavlakos (George Pavlakos, 3D human-mesh-recovery researcher - relevant to embodied-dreamfinder).
